html:
Exclusive to:

The Gramophone is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates and based on the Gramophone from Don't Starve. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 3 Gold Nugget, 2 Electrical Doodad and 1 Gears and require an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Gramophone can be placed on a Wooden Table or on the floor. It will play a music track for 62 seconds, if a Record is inserted. The music is heard within a range of 8 tiles, becoming much quieter the further the Gramophone is away and can also be turned on and of at the Gramophone. The played record will remain in the Gramophone unless it gets replaced by another record or gets destroyed. The Gramophone can also be used to tend Farm Plants within a range of 2 tiles.

Even though the Gramophone is an item, it can be destroyed with a Hammer. The music the Gramophone is playing doesn't replace other ingame music, so 2 different music tracks can be heard at the same time.

Trivia

  • Wendy and Woodie's examination quotes are references to Danse Macabre and Photograph respectively.

Exclusive to:
“Oh no, I've seen THAT before.”
–Wilson
“Oh, Maxwell will love this.”
–Willow
“Is box that sings!”
–Wolfgang
“Shall we have a danse macabre?”
–Wendy
“IT'S AN OLDER MODEL”
–WX-78
“The music was better back in my day.”
–Wickerbottom
“Look at this phonograph.”
–Woodie
“That accursed thing!”
–Maxwell
“A mechanical söngstress.”
–Wigfrid
“We could listen to that forever.”
–Webber
“One song can evoke many memories. Perhaps too many.”
–Warly
“Singing box”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' like some music to get through the workday faster.”
–Winona
“Ooo, music! I'm practically giddy!”
–Wortox
“Music come out of it, florp!”
–Wurt
“It's almost as good as a radio. Almost.”
–Walter
“Shall we play something new or something old?”
–Wanda
The Gramophone is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates and based on the Gramophone from Don't Starve. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter with 3 Gold Nugget, 2 Electrical Doodad and 1 Gears and require an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
The Gramophone can be placed on a Wooden Table or on the floor. It will play a music track for 62 seconds, if a Record is inserted. The music is heard within a range of 8 tiles, becoming much quieter the further the Gramophone is away and can also be turned on and of at the Gramophone. The played record will remain in the Gramophone unless it gets replaced by another record or gets destroyed. The Gramophone can also be used to tend Farm Plants within a range of 2 tiles.
Even though the Gramophone is an item, it can be destroyed with a Hammer. The music the Gramophone is playing doesn't replace other ingame music, so 2 different music tracks can be heard at the same time.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Máy Hát là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật From Beyond và dựa trên Máy Hát từ Don't Starve. Nó có thể được chế tạo trong Bộ lọc trang trí với 3 Thỏi vàng, 2 Doodad điện và 1 Bánh răng và yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.

Almost. |wanda = Shall we play something new or something old? |choose = willow }} The '''Gramophone''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced within the ''[[From Beyond]]'' updates and based on the Gramophone from ''Don't Starve''. It can be crafted in the [[Decorations Filter]] with 3 [[Gold Nugget]], 2 [[Electrical Doodad]] and 1 [[Gears]] and require an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The Gramophone can be placed on a [[Wooden Table]] or on the floor. It will play a music track for 62 seconds, if a [[Records|Record]] is inserted. The music is heard within a range of 8 tiles, becoming much quieter the further the Gramophone is away and can also be turned on and of at the Gramophone. The played record will remain in the Gramophone unless it gets replaced by another record or gets destroyed. The Gramophone can also be used to tend [[Farm Plant]]s within a range of 2 tiles. Even though the Gramophone is an item, it can be destroyed with a [[Hammer]].
